indications.text:
1.1 Breast Cancer
BEIZRAY is indicated for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer
after failure of prior chemotherapy.
BEIZRAY in combination with doxorubicin and cyclophosphamide is indicated for the adjuvant
